name: Savers Value Village, Inc.
summary: Part I Company Overview Savers Value Village, Inc. (the Company, we, us, or our") is the largest for-profit thrift operator in the United States (U.S.) and Canada based on number of stores. With nearly 24,000 team members, we operate a total of 367 stores under the Savers , Value Village , Value Village Boutique , Village des Valeurs MD , Unique and 2nd Ave. banners. As of January3, 2026, we had 179 stores in the U.S., 170 stores in Canada and 18 stores in Australia. The Company reports on a fis...
